creator: sperber@informatik.uni-tuebingen.de
text:
/boot/loader doesn't work on a Xybernaut MA IV.  It simply says

can't load 'kernel'
can't load 'kernel.old'

Moreover, when I try to ls from the loader prompt, it says

open '/' failed: no such file or directory

However, I can boot the kernel directly, and things work fine from
then on.

Fix: 

Install a boot.config with "kernel" in it.
How-To-Repeat: 
Do a regular install of 4.3-RELEASE.  Reboot.
